title: verbascum leptostachyon
intro: Verbascum leptostachyon, also known as the small mullein or white mullein, is a biennial plant species that belongs to the mullein genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Verbascum leptostachyon include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
